title: FixReborn
description: TechReborn datapack fix and 1,21,x update recipe
body:
![FixReborn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d6c2a2d511028449a9e6033a3ccfc1b3ad2a154.png)
This data pack modifies TechReborn recipes and adds recipes for items in 1.21.x.

### -industrial electrolyzer-
 Modify the number of input and output cells.

### -crafting table-
 ev transformer can be created to release the advancement

### -assembling machine-
 cupper block + template template -> bolt armor trim smithing template 
 
 tuff + template template -> flow armor trim smithing template

### -blast furnace recipe-
 wind charge + 4x clay ball -> flow pottery sherd 
 
 breeze rod + 4x clay ball -> guster pottery sherd 
 
 iron axe + 4x clay ball -> scrape pottery sherd 

### -grinder compressor-
 breeze_rod <-> 8x wind charge
